dialogueChunks.intro: They're safe! {player_name}, they're actually safe! I can hardly believe it!
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is being tended to by the healers now. Bruised, exhausted, but alive. They told us everything: how you fought through the {enemy_type}, how you carried the wounded on your back when they couldn't walk. The children haven't stopped talking about you. They're calling you their guardian spirit.
dialogueChunks.outro: We gathered everything of value we could find as thanks. It's not enough, it will never be enough, but please take it.

playerResponses.text: Seeing them safe is all the reward I need.
I'm glad everyone made it. Take care of them.

dialogueChunks.intro: You brought them home, {player_name}. Every single one of them.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement erupted when they saw {target_npc} walking through the gates. People who hadn't smiled in days were weeping with joy. The healers say everyone will recover, though some will carry scars. {target_npc} asked me to tell you something: they said you moved through those {enemy_type} like you were born for it, and that they've never seen anything braver.
dialogueChunks.outro: You gave us back our people. Here, take this with the gratitude of every soul in {location}.

playerResponses.text: Tell {target_npc} to rest up. They showed plenty of courage themselves.
Just doing what needed to be done. Stay safe out there.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}... I won't lie to you. Not everyone made it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You saved most of them, and that matters. But two of the captives didn't survive the ordeal. {target_npc} is alive thanks to you, though they're not speaking much. The grief is heavy in {location} tonight: joy and sorrow all tangled together. You did everything you could, and without you, none of them would have come home.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take this. It was set aside for whoever brought our people back. You earned it, every bit of it, even if the ending is heavier than we hoped.

playerResponses.text: I wish I'd been faster. I'm sorry for the ones we lost.
The ones who survived will carry their memory forward. That matters.

dialogueChunks.intro: You did it, {player_name}. Against everything, you brought them home.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} organized a vigil last night for the rescue. The whole settlement turned out, torches lining the main road from the gate to the square. They wanted you to walk through it, but I told them you'd probably find that embarrassing. The point is this: {location} remembers its heroes, and your name is now carved alongside the founders on the remembrance stone.
dialogueChunks.outro: This is from all of us. And whenever you return, there will be a fire lit and a seat waiting.

playerResponses.text: A place on the remembrance stone? I'm honored beyond words.
That's very kind. I'll visit when the road brings me back.
